kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Between Edmund and 13 coins, one goes with Millpond and the other with Oldwall.
The artisan with 15 coins does not belong to the South Side if and only if either Cedric belongs to the Market Ward or Bridgegate goes with 9 coins (but not both).
Either Aldric belongs to the Clothiers' Guild or both members of the South Side belong to the Clothiers' Guild.
Exactly one of these is true: Blacksmith goes with 5 coins; Weaver goes with 7 coins; Highrow goes with 5 coins.
If Fletcher goes with 11 coins, then 15 coins goes with Godfrey.
Cedric's levy is higher than both the Carpenter and the artisan in Millpond.
More members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the North Side than members of the Ironmongers' Guild.
13 coins goes with exactly two of Aldric, Tanner, and Millpond.
Cooper, 7 coins, and 11 coins go with Matilda, Highrow, and Southgate, in some order.
At most one of Wulfric and the Tanner belongs to the North Side.
Either Matilda belongs to the Market Ward or both members of the Ironmongers' Guild belong to the Market Ward.
The artisan in Southgate's levy is lower than both Godfrey and the Weaver.
